zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Padley於1400年出生在英國德比夏爾德比時，她的父親Robert De Padley IV25歲，母親Joan Barlow24歲。她於1420年與Robert Eyre I在英國德比夏爾哈黑薩結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1463年3月9日在英國德比夏爾瑟 帕德利享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈黑薩。

nameMeanings.name: Padley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Nether Padley (Derbyshire), which is recorded as Paddeley(e) in the 13th century, or perhaps from Upper Padley in Hathersage or Padley Hall in Ripley (both also Derbyshire). The placenames derive from the Old English personal name Pad(d)a or Old English padde ‘toad’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Padley was born in 1400, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, her father, Robert De Padley IV, was 25 and her mother, Joan Barlow, was 24. She married Robert Eyre I in 1420, in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 9 March 1463, in Nether Padley, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Padley est née en 1400, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert De Padley IV, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan Barlow, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Eyre I en 1420, à Hathersage, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 mars 1463, à Nether Padley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Hathersage, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna Padley 1400 in Derby, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert De Padley IV 25 und ihre Mutter Joan Barlow 24. Sie hat 1420 in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England Robert Eyre I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. März 1463 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Nether Padley, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Robert Eyre I nel 1420, nel Hathersage, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Padleyが1400年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで生まれた時，父Robert De Padley IVは25歳，母Joan Barlowは24歳であった。1420年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハスエルサッジでRobert Eyre Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1463年3月9日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアネスエル プアドリーで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアハスエルサッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Padley(이)가 1400년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert De Padley IV(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Barlow(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 더비실르 하더사지에서 Robert Eyre I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 3월 9일 영국 더비실르 네터 파들리에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 하더사지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Padley nasceu em 1400, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert De Padley IV, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan Barlow, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Eyre I em 1420, em Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de março de 1463, em Nether Padley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Padley родилась в 1400 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert De Padley IV было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Barlow, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Eyre I в 1420 г. в местности хатирсадж, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 9 марта 1463 г. в местности нетир падли, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности хатирсадж, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Padley nació en 1400, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert De Padley IV, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joan Barlow, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Robert Eyre I en 1420, en Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 9 de marzo de 1463, en Nether Padley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
